title: creact
description: The CReact CLI. Type-checks and runs your entry point with state persistence.
row_entry_file_desc: Path to the entry TypeScript/TSX file (e.g. <0>index.tsx</0>).
row_watch_desc: Watch source files and restart on changes.
code_examples:
# Single run
creact index.tsx

# Watch mode
creact --watch index.tsx

# Via npm scripts
npm run start    # "creact index.tsx"
npm run dev      # "creact --watch index.tsx"
behavior_typecheck: Runs TypeScript type checking on your project (skipped if TypeScript is not installed)
behavior_execute: If type checking passes, executes the entry file using <0>tsx</0>
behavior_default_export: The entry file's default export (an async function) is called
behavior_render_cycle: The render cycle runs: build tree, reconcile, run handlers, save state
behavior_exit: In single-run mode, exits after completion
